Biutiful (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,101,237Details
International Box Office $19,586,287
Worldwide Box Office $24,687,524
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,911,914
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $578,233
Total $3,490,147
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Uxbal is a conflicted man who struggles to reconcile fatherhood, love, spirituality, crime, guilt and mortality amidst the dangerous underworld of modern Barcelona. His livelihood is earned out of bounds, his sacrifices for his children know no bounds. As fate encircles him and thresholds are crossed, a dim, redemptive road brightens, illuminating the inheritances bestowed from father to child, and the paternal guiding hand that navigates life’s corridors, whether bright, bad or biutiful.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$456,930 (9.0% of total gross)
Legs:7.95 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:59 opening theaters/191 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $7,693,879

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 21st, 2010 (Special Engagement) by Roadside Attractions
December 29th, 2010 (Oscar Qualifying Run) by Roadside Attractions
January 28th, 2011 (Limited) by Roadside Attractions
Video Release: May 31st, 2011 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for disturbing images, language, some sexual content, nudity and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2140, 9/29/2010)
Running Time: 138 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Foreign Language
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Haunting, LGBTQ+, Mental Illness, Religious, Terminal Illness
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Life Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Menage Atroz, Producciones Mod, Ikiru Films
Production Countries: Spain, Mexico
Languages: English

Synopsis

Uxbal is a conflicted man who struggles to reconcile fatherhood, love, spirituality, crime, guilt and mortality amidst the dangerous underworld of modern Barcelona. His livelihood is earned out of bounds, his sacrifices for his children know no bounds. As fate encircles him and thresholds are crossed, a dim, redemptive road brightens, illuminating the inheritances bestowed from father to child, and the paternal guiding hand that navigates life’s corridors, whether bright, bad or biutiful.
